name: Roland Code Orchestrator (RCO)
description: Multi-agent recipe orchestration for Claude: run PlanExecRevEx and other workflows via slash commands.

commands.name: rco-run:recipe
commands.description: Run an RCO recipe with a task (e.g. PlanExecRevEx --task "Build a CLI")

commands.name: rco-export
commands.description: Export last session to Cursor rules and MCP snippet
